name: cs2-skin-marketplace
description: CS2 Skin Marketplace - Full Stack Microservice Application

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "GATEWAY,AUTH,MARKET,NOTIFY,FRONTEND" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow,green,magenta,blue" "npm run dev --prefix services/api-gateway" "npm run dev --prefix services/auth-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/marketplace-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/notification-service" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix services/api-gateway && npm install --prefix services/auth-service && npm install --prefix services/marketplace-service && npm install --prefix services/notification-service
scripts.db:migrate: npm run db:migrate --prefix services/auth-service & npm run db:migrate --prefix services/marketplace-service & npm run db:migrate --prefix services/notification-service
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run infra:up
